subcodes.first_line: Blessed are those who have fixed their gaze on the realm of glory and have followed the commandments of the Lord of Names. Blessed is he who in the days of God will engage in handicrafts
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی از برای نفوسیکه بافق اعلی ناظرند و بامر مالک اسما عامل
subcodes.subjects: @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @work as worship
full_text_parts: Blessed is he who in the prime of his youth and the heyday of his life will arise to serve the Cause of the Lord of the beginning and of the end, and adorn his heart with His love. The manifestation of such a grace is greater than the creation of the heavens and of the earth. Blessed are the steadfast and well is it with those who are firm.
